title: THD Room Taxonomy
description: Canonical room/building metadata shared by Android and iOS. Drives RoomPresentationFormatter on both platforms.

version.description: Schema version. Increment when breaking changes are made.

campuses.description: Top-level campus groupings (Deggendorf, Pfarrkirchen/ECRI, Cham, Other).

sites.description: Sub-campus sites. Each site belongs to exactly one campus.

buildings.description: Individual buildings. Each building belongs to exactly one site.

roomCodePatterns.description: Ordered list of regexes (ECMA-262 / Java syntax, case-insensitive). Applied left-to-right against the raw room name to extract a canonical room code (e.g. 'A 008', 'I112'). First match wins.

roomKinds.description: Room-type classification rules. Matched against the normalised searchable text for a room.

visibilityRules.description: Ordered list of visibility classification rules. First matching rule wins.

exceptionRules.description: Room-level overrides applied before any general rules. Matched against the normalised room label.

key.description: Machine-readable identifier used as campusKey in sites and as the selectedCampusKey filter value.

label.description: Human-readable campus name shown in the UI.

sortOrder.description: Ascending display order in campus filter chips.

aliases.description: Lowercase normalised strings used to match campus names from room data.

sortOrder.description: Ascending display order within a campus.

key.description: Machine-readable identifier used as groupKey in room list sections.

isMainCampus.description: True for Deggendorf main-campus buildings covered by RoomPriorityPolicy. Kept in sync with RoomPriorityPolicy.mainCampusBuildings via a unit test.

patterns.description: Regexes matched against the normalised room label to assign a room to this building. Evaluated in order; first match wins across all buildings.

aliases.description: Lowercase shorthand names for the building used in campus hint matching.

key.description: Machine-readable kind identifier (e.g. 'lecture_hall'). Must match a RoomKind enum rawKey on both platforms.

label.description: Human-readable kind label shown in room cards.

keywords.description: Lowercase normalised keywords. A room matches this kind if any keyword appears in its searchable text.

visibilityClass.description: Visibility class assigned when any pattern matches.

patterns.description: Regexes (case-insensitive) matched against the normalised room label.

pattern.description: Case-insensitive regex matched against the normalised room label. All other fields override the general classification when this rule fires.

roomKindKey.description: If set, overrides the inferred RoomKind. Must be a valid roomKind.key.

campusKey.description: If set, overrides the inferred campus. Must be a valid campus.key.

siteKey.description: If set, overrides the inferred site. Must be a valid site.key.
